com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot

Description
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
 
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
 

  • Uses of Shot in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller

    Fields in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller with type parameters of type Shot
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final ArrayDeque<Shot>
    GameController.turnQueue
    Buffers the model-level outcome of a shot (human or machine) between the moment it is applied to the Board/GameSession under lock, and the moment its marker is actually painted on screen.
    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller with parameters of type Shot
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    GameController.markShipSunk(Shot shot)
     
    private void
    GameController.renderShotMarker(Shot shot)
    Paints the appropriate MarkerShapeFactory marker for a shot on whichever board it landed on: the opponent's board for a human shot, the player's own board for a machine shot.

  • Uses of Shot in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities

    Fields in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities with type parameters of type Shot
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final LinkedList<Shot>
    GameSession.shotHistory
    Ordered history of every shot fired in the match, used to reconstruct the visual board state after loading a saved game.
